relations.note: Exempts chart and table components from the default asymmetric diagonal corner styling rule.

quotes: A rectangle with selectively enlarged opposite corner radii; the other two corners keep a slight radius.

large: 120px & 6px; banner: 48px & 6px; callout: 42px & 6px. Apply the large radius to one diagonal pair (e.g., top-left + bottom-right), the 6px radius to the other pair. Be consistent within an email

rules.intent: Maintain the optimistic, modern asymmetric framing device consistently across all layouts.
rules.rule_text: The signature brand accent shape employs asymmetric rounded corners on containers and photos. For emails, apply a selective diagonal pairing: one diagonal pair uses a large radius (large radius = 120px, banner radius = 48px, or callout radius = 42px), while the opposite diagonal pair retains a small radius (radius.general.small = 6px). The diagonal orientation must remain consistent throughout a single email (default: large radius top-left and bottom-right).

quotes: Exception: charts and tables use uniform rounded corners on all four corners (not the asymmetric accent shape). [GENERAL: 12px uniform radius.]

rules.intent: Ensure tabular and data visualizations remain legible and structured by using symmetrical boundaries.
rules.rule_text: Charts and tables are exempt from the asymmetric accent shape and must use uniform rounded corners on all four corners (radius.infographic.panel = 12px).
